title.en: Supreme God, Owner of the Sky

summary.zh: 约鲁巴神系的至高神，又称奥罗伦（"天空之主"），万物权能"阿谢"的源头。不设神庙与神像，经由众奥里沙治理世界。
summary.en: Supreme god of the Yoruba pantheon, also called Olorun, 'Owner of the Sky'. Source of ase, the power behind all effective action, he has no shrines or images and rules through the orishas.

description.zh:
奥罗杜马雷是约鲁巴神系的至高神，又称奥罗伦（Olórun，"天空之主"）。他居于天上，遥远而不可见，是"阿谢"（àṣẹ）——使言语成真、使谋划成事的权能——的唯一源头。众奥里沙各司其职，都是他意志的执行者；奥巴塔拉用黏土塑好人形之后，由奥罗杜马雷把气息吹入躯体，赋予生命。约鲁巴人相信，每个人出生之前都要在他面前跪下，领受自己的命运。

创世的工程由他发起：他交给下界的神使一只装着泥土的蜗牛壳、一只鸽子和一只五趾母鸡。泥土倒在原初的水面上，鸽子与母鸡把它刨散成陆地，他又两次派变色龙下去查验大地是否宽广坚实。据伊多武记录的伊费口传，"大地宽了"（ilẹ̀ ń fẹ̀）一语正是圣城伊费得名的由来。

与诸奥里沙不同，奥罗杜马雷没有神庙、神像，也没有专属祭司——伊多武1962年的经典研究把这一点视为约鲁巴信仰的基本结构：人只能通过众神间接接近至高神，但一切祈祷的结尾都要以"阿谢"一词封印，用法近于阿门。在跨越大西洋的古巴桑特里亚与巴西坎东布莱信仰中，他的名号原样保留在神系的顶端。
description.en:
Olodumare, also called Olorun, 'Owner of the Sky', is the supreme god of the Yoruba pantheon. He dwells remote in the heavens, the sole source of ase, the power that makes words and deeds effective. The orishas govern the world as his ministers; when Obatala has molded a human figure from clay, it is Olodumare who breathes life into it. Before birth, every soul kneels in his presence to receive its destiny.

Creation began at his command. He handed the descending gods a snail shell filled with earth, a pigeon, and a five-toed hen: the earth was poured on the primeval waters, the birds scratched it wide into land, and he then twice sent the chameleon down to test whether the ground had grown firm and broad. According to the Ife tradition recorded by E. Bolaji Idowu, the report that 'the earth is wide' (ile n fe) gave the holy city of Ife its name.

Unlike the orishas, Olodumare has no temples, no images, and no priesthood of his own; worship reaches him through the lesser gods, yet every prayer is sealed with the word ase, much as with amen. Across the Atlantic, Cuban Santeria and Brazilian Candomble kept his name at the summit of their pantheons.

value.zh: 无神庙、无神像、无专属祭司
value.en: No shrines, images, or dedicated priesthood
Source of ase, the power to make things happen

sources.zh: E·博拉吉·伊多武《奥罗杜马雷：约鲁巴信仰中的神》（1962）
sources.en: E. Bolaji Idowu, Olodumare: God in Yoruba Belief (1962)

sources.zh: 伊法口传经文（奥杜·伊法）
威廉·巴斯科姆《伊法占卜：西非神人之间的沟通》（1969）
sources.en: William Bascom, Ifa Divination: Communication Between Gods and Men in West Africa (1969)
